title: dendrochilum smithianum
intro: Dendrochilum smithianum, also known as the Smith's Dendrochilum, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dendrochilum smithianum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antivenom. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used as infusions or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
